arduino_fft_init.message0: create FFT %1 type %2 samples %3 sampling frequency %4 Hz
arduino_fft_init.tooltip: Create an arduinoFFT object and its real/imaginary sample buffers.

arduino_fft_set_sample.message0: FFT %1 set sample index %2 real %3 imaginary %4
arduino_fft_set_sample.tooltip: Write one real/imaginary sample into the FFT buffers.

arduino_fft_clear_samples.tooltip: Set all real and imaginary samples to zero.

arduino_fft_sample_analog.message0: FFT %1 sample analog pin %2 offset %3 scale %4
arduino_fft_sample_analog.tooltip: Fill the FFT buffers from analogRead at the configured sampling frequency.

arduino_fft_generate_tone.message0: FFT %1 generate tone frequency %2 Hz amplitude %3 offset %4
arduino_fft_generate_tone.tooltip: Generate a sine-wave test signal into the FFT buffers.

arduino_fft_dc_removal.tooltip: Subtract the mean value from the real sample buffer.

arduino_fft_windowing.tooltip: Apply one of the arduinoFFT window functions to the real buffer.

arduino_fft_compute.tooltip: Run the FFT calculation on the configured buffers.

arduino_fft_complex_to_magnitude.tooltip: Convert the complex FFT result into magnitudes stored in the real buffer.

arduino_fft_process.message0: FFT %1 run forward pipeline window %2 remove DC %3 compensate %4
arduino_fft_process.tooltip: Run the common dcRemoval, windowing, compute, and complexToMagnitude sequence.

arduino_fft_major_peak.tooltip: Return the dominant frequency after magnitude conversion.

arduino_fft_major_peak_parabola.tooltip: Return the dominant frequency using parabolic interpolation.

arduino_fft_peak_magnitude.tooltip: Return the magnitude estimate for the dominant peak.

arduino_fft_bin_frequency.tooltip: Convert a FFT bin index into its frequency in Hz.

arduino_fft_bin_magnitude.tooltip: Read a magnitude value from the real buffer by FFT bin index.

arduino_fft_band_magnitude.message0: FFT %1 magnitude of band %2 in %3 bands
arduino_fft_band_magnitude.tooltip: Return the maximum magnitude inside a coarse frequency band.

arduino_fft_print_bins.message0: FFT %1 print bins to %2 from %3 to %4
arduino_fft_print_bins.tooltip: Print frequency and magnitude pairs for a range of FFT bins.

arduino_fft_revision.tooltip: Return the arduinoFFT revision macro value.
